data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the multi-channel requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the multi-channel capability (email, SMS, push notification) as specified in the use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm the implementation of these channels. The linked use case mentions the need for multi-channel support, but without concrete examples or endpoints demonstrating this functionality, the validation cannot be conclusively assessed.
gaps: No evidence of multi-channel (email, SMS, push notification) implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify multi-channel support.
